zh.lifeSummary: 當John Broughton IV於1435年出生在英國素福爾可肯特維爾時，他的父親Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston29歲，母親Elizabeth Stoneham10歲。他於1459年與Anne Denston在英國藍卡爾鮑頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1479年10月10日在英國藍卡爾鮑頓享年44歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可丹斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Broughton IV于1435年出生在英国素福爾可肯特維爾时，他的父亲Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston29岁，母亲Elizabeth Stoneham10岁。他于1459年与Anne Denston在英国藍卡爾鮑頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1479年10月10日在英国藍卡爾鮑頓享年44岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可丹斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Broughton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in all parts of England called Broughton. The first element is variously Old English brōc ‘brook’, burg ‘fortress’, or beorg ‘hill, mound’; the second is in all cases Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Braughton
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Broughton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Broughton IV was born in 1435, in Kentwell, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Stoneham, was 10. He married Anne Denston in 1459, in Broughton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 October 1479, in Broughton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Denston, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Broughton IV est né en 1435, à Kentwell, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stoneham, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Anne Denston en 1459, à Broughton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 octobre 1479, à Broughton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Denston, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Broughton IV 1435 in Kentwell, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston 29 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Stoneham 10. Er hat 1459 in Broughton, Lancashire, England Anne Denston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. Oktober 1479 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Broughton, Lancashire, England und wurde in Denston, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Broughton IV è nato il nel 1435 nel Kentwell, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Stoneham, aveva 10 anni. Lui sposato Anne Denston nel 1459, nel Broughton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 ottobre 1479, nel Broughton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Denston, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Broughton IVが1435年にイギリススフォルクケントウエルで生まれた時，父Sir John de Broughton III, of Prestonは29歳，母Elizabeth Stonehamは10歳であった。1459年にイギリスランカシュアイアブロウトンでAnne Denstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1479年10月10日にイギリスランカシュアイアブロウトンで44歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクデンストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Broughton IV(이)가 1435년 영국 수폴크 켄트웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Stoneham(은)는 10세였다. 그는 1459년 영국 랭카실르 브루그h턴에서 Anne Denston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1479년 10월 10일 영국 랭카실르 브루그h턴에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 덴스턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Broughton, Preston, Lancashire, England: Broughton, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Broughton IV nasceu em 1435, em Kentwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stoneham, tinha 10 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Denston em 1459, em Broughton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1479, em Broughton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Denston, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Broughton IV родился в 1435 г. в местности кэнтвелл, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stoneham, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Denston в 1459 г. в местности броугтон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 октября 1479 г. в местности броугтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности денстон, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Broughton IV nació en 1435, en Kentwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stoneham, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Anne Denston en 1459, en Broughton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1479, en Broughton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Denston, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
